title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Tata CLiQ

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Tata CLiQ
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata CLiQ. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Tata CLiQ:
Tata CLiQ is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ!
